_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Perform needs analysis to determine opportunities for new and improved business process solutions.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in conducting operational process improvement for data workflows, identifying inefficiencies, designing automation opportunities, and measuring improvement outcomes.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI OP domain. OP-S-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-A-002 (OP, cosine: 0.551), AB-T-001 (AB, cosine: 0.506).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.1/10 (raw 0.610). Shared vocabulary: [opportunities, process]. DCWF-only terms [analysis, business, determine, improved, needs, new] vs WIDAI-only terms [automation, conducting, data, designing, identifying, improvement] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.884 (P=0.889, R=0.880). Balanced P/R — the 13-word DCWF element and 18-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.4%). "Perform needs analysis to determine opportunities for new and improved business" and "Skill in conducting operational process improvement for data workflows, identify" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.564 ≈ STS 0.610 (gap 0.047). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [opportunities, process] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 15.4%. Shared tokens: [opportunities, process]. DCWF-only: [analysis, business, determine, improved, needs, new]. WIDAI-only: [automation, conducting, data, designing, identifying, improvement].
